---
title: "Film Study Modeling"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  data_dir: "data/processed/film_study"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
data_dir <- params$data_dir

read_csv_if_exists <- function(name) {
  path <- file.path(data_dir, name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(data.frame())
  }
  read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

summary_path <- file.path(data_dir, "film_study_model_summary.json")
summary_lines <- if (file.exists(summary_path)) readLines(summary_path, warn = FALSE) else "Model summary not created yet."
event_frame <- read_csv_if_exists("film_study_event_model_frame.csv")
possession_frame <- read_csv_if_exists("film_study_possession_model_frame.csv")
event_metrics <- read_csv_if_exists("film_study_event_model_metrics.csv")
event_coefs <- read_csv_if_exists("film_study_event_model_coefficients.csv")
event_preds <- read_csv_if_exists("film_study_event_model_predictions.csv")
pos_metrics <- read_csv_if_exists("film_study_possession_model_metrics.csv")
pos_coefs <- read_csv_if_exists("film_study_possession_model_coefficients.csv")
pos_preds <- read_csv_if_exists("film_study_possession_model_predictions.csv")
```

# Overview

This private report summarizes experimental models fit from the local film-study event tags. If the tagged sample is too small, the report shows the gating rule instead of pretending the estimates are stable.

# Model Summary

```{r summary}
cat(paste(summary_lines, collapse = "\n"))
```

# Event Model Frame

```{r event-frame}
event_frame
```

# Next Event Shot Model

```{r event-model}
if (nrow(event_metrics) == 0) {
  cat("The next-event shot model was not fit because the local sample is still too small.\n")
} else {
  event_metrics
}
```

```{r event-coefs}
if (nrow(event_coefs) > 0) {
  event_coefs
}
```

```{r event-preds}
if (nrow(event_preds) > 0) {
  cols <- intersect(c("match_key", "event_index", "event_type", "next_event_type", "pred_next_shot_prob"), names(event_preds))
  event_preds[, cols, drop = FALSE]
}
```

# Possession Model Frame

```{r possession-frame}
possession_frame
```

# Possession Outcome Model

```{r possession-model}
if (nrow(pos_metrics) == 0) {
  cat("The possession outcome model was not fit because the local sample is still too small.\n")
} else {
  pos_metrics
}
```

```{r possession-coefs}
if (nrow(pos_coefs) > 0) {
  pos_coefs
}
```

```{r possession-preds}
if (nrow(pos_preds) > 0) {
  cols <- intersect(c("match_key", "possession_id", "possession_outcome", "predicted_outcome"), names(pos_preds))
  pos_preds[, cols, drop = FALSE]
}
```
